features.adminVerifiedDesc: Every campaign and item request is reviewed by our team before it goes live. Nothing gets through without a real check.
features.zeroFeesDesc: We charge nothing. Every rupee you donate or every item you give reaches the person who needs it.
features.localMatchingDesc: Item donations are matched with people within 10 km of you, making drop-offs simple and quick.
features.impactCertificatesDesc: After your donation is delivered, you receive a verified certificate you can keep or share.

provide.verifiedCampaignsDesc: Every person who posts a campaign is checked by our team first. You know your money is going somewhere real.
provide.moneyOrItemsDesc: Donate cash to a campaign, or give physical items like books, clothes, or a laptop to someone nearby.
provide.localDropoffsDesc: Item donations are matched within 10 km. No couriers, no shipping fees — just direct giving to a neighbour.

campaignNew.heading: Start a money campaign
campaignNew.subtitle: Tell your story honestly. Our admin team will verify and approve within 24–48 hours.
campaignNew.noStatesListed: No states listed for this country.
campaignNew.placeholderStory: Explain the situation, why funds are needed, how they'll be used...
campaignNew.hintPhotos: Upload up to 4 photos. Clear photos help donors connect with your cause.
campaignNew.photoFormats: JPG, PNG up to 10 MB each · Max 4 photos
campaignNew.hintVideo: Vertical 9:16 video recommended (like a phone reel). Keep uploaded files short.
campaignNew.videoFormats: MP4, MOV, WebM · Keep short for best performance
campaignNew.hintDocs: Medical reports, ID proofs, hospital quotes, etc. Helps admin verify faster.
campaignNew.feeNotice: You receive 95% of the total amount raised. CauseKind deducts a transparent 5% platform fee only from the donee settlement — donors are never charged extra.
campaignNew.toastRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.

certificate.donationDescription: For your kind in-kind donation that has reached the donee and made a meaningful difference in someone's life.
certificate.verifiedNote: Verified by CauseKind admin · Delivery proof on file

faq.heading: Common questions
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know before you give.
faq.q1: Is it free to use Causekind?
faq.a1: Yes, completely free. We charge zero platform fees for donors or recipients. 100% of what you give goes directly to the cause you choose.
faq.q2: How do you check campaigns before they go live?
faq.a2: Every campaign and item request is reviewed by our team before it appears on the site. We verify the person's identity and confirm that the need is genuine. Anything that doesn't pass our checks is rejected.
faq.q3: Can I donate physical items like clothes or books?
faq.a3: Yes. Browse the In-Kind Requests section to find people nearby who need specific items. Once you pick a request, you can arrange to hand over the items directly or through one of our listed drop points.
faq.q4: How does money get to the campaign?
faq.a4: Donations are collected and held securely. Once a campaign reaches its target or its deadline passes, funds are transferred directly to the recipient. You receive a confirmation email at each stage.
faq.q5: Can I track where my donation goes?
faq.a5: Yes. After donating, you can log in to see the status of your donation and get a verified impact certificate once the funds or items are delivered.
faq.q6: Who can post a campaign or request?
faq.a6: Anyone can register as a Donee and submit a campaign or item request. Every submission goes through our approval process before it becomes visible to donors.

about.headline: Our Mission & Story
about.subheadline: Connecting kind hearts directly with verified needs, with zero fees.
about.visionText: To build a transparent and efficient ecosystem where every act of kindness directly reaches the person in need.
about.missionText: To simplify in-kind donations, eliminate middlemen, and utilize intelligent matching to direct resources where they matter most.
